ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-30-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-15-2022 Continued To Jan-30-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: William Walker, via Zoom, for Stefanie Rosemond, Personal Representative.

Counsel advises that the state of California has released funds to the related Estate matter in Contra Costa County and that he intends to file a petition for final distribution in that matter, soon and requests a continuance to January of 2023 accordingly. The court advises counsel that it is inclined to grant his request for a continuance and advises him that the court will be expecting him to file either a petition for final distribution or a petition to approve report on status of administration prior to the next hearing date.

The matter is continued to Jan-30-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-27-2022 Continued To Aug-15-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jan-05-2022 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-18-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-24-2021 Continued To Oct-18-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: William Walker, via CourtCall, counsel for Stefanie Rosemond, Executor.

The court begins by advising counsel that currently, an Inventory and Appraisal and several other documents have yet to be filed with the court. Counsel advises that there are currently two other pending Probate matters in other counties and that this matter will receive distributions from them as soon as they are resolved. Counsel requests a continuance to November. The court advises counsel that it is willing to allow a shorter continuance.

After discussion the Status on Close of Estate is continued to September 27, 2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204. The court advises counsel that a Petition for Final Distribution or a Petition on Status of Administration must be filed for the new hearing date to be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

***Due to Examiner's unavailability, this matter will be continued further to October 18, 2021 at 9:00 am. The court will notify counsel of the new date.
